txt_en: Our most beautiful things in the world are by Labour, by human's hand created.
txt_cn: 世界上最美好的东西，都是由劳动、由人的聪明的双手创造出来的。

txt_en: Kindness is a language that the deaf can hear and the blind can see.
txt_cn: 善良是一种语言，聋者能听，盲者能见。

txt_en: From now on, if there is no torchlight, then I will be the only light.
txt_cn: 此后如竟没有炬火，我便是唯一的光。

txt_en: Summer, after all, is a time when wonderful things can happen to quiet people.
txt_cn: 毕竟，夏天是安静之人也会遇到美好事情的季节。

txt_en: Energy and persistence conquer all things.
txt_cn: 精力与坚持，能征服万物。

txt_en: We all live under the same sky, but we don't all have the same horizon.
txt_cn: 我们头顶同一片天空，但眼中的地平线却各不相同。

txt_en: Life is a game in which the player must appear ridiculous.
txt_cn: 人生就是一场游戏，所有玩家都必须表现得很荒唐。

txt_en: It's not who we are underneath, but what we do that defines us.
txt_cn: 决定我们是谁的，不是我们的内在本性，而是我们的所作所为。

txt_en: Life began with waking up and loving my mother's face.
txt_cn: 生命始于醒来之时，始于爱上母亲的面容。
